case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT vs. ARAKAWA, MAYUMI et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SERVED JAN-09-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1080 BUSH ST #401-B, LEASE FORFEITED
AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DEFENDANT SUED INCORRECTLY AS ARAKAWA, MIYUMI TO BE ARAKAWA, MAYUMI
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT DEFAULT OF JAN-16-1998 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF JAN-16-1998 SET ASIDE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $11.79 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1080 BUSH STREET, #401-B, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,415.40 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,415.40, STAYED UNTIL MAR-19-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, STIPULATED.................. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH........ NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARAKAWA, MAYUMI
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT JUDGMENT OF MAR-04-1998 SET ASIDE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
